headline: 2 Services Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Ignore
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. But cutbacks in corporate spending and the threat of new AI products have kept sentiment in check, and over the past six months, the industry has tumbled by 2.6%. This performance was disheartening since the S&P 500 gained 4.8%.

headline: Telecom stocks have had a great start to the year — and they’re still quite cheap
summary: Several companies in the S 500’s communications sector trade at low price-to-earnings valuations, with attractive dividend yields well supported by cash flow.
